steps: Go to https://plausible.io and log in to your account
Click your account name in the top-right corner and select 'Settings'
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys'
Enter a descriptive name for the key and select 'Stats API' as the key type
Click 'Create API Key' and copy the key — it is shown only once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Plausible API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Stats API keys can be created from the UI; Sites Provisioning API keys require contacting Plausible support
API key is shown only once at creation — copy and store it securely
Rate limit: 600 requests per hour by default
Plausible offers a 30-day free trial; paid plans start at $9/month
Self-hosted Plausible instances can also generate API keys via the same settings UI

test_endpoint.description: List all sites in the account to verify the API key is valid
